89526.example_1: imesaṃ kho, gahapati, pañcannaṃ dhammānaṃ iṭṭhānaṃ kantānaṃ manāpānaṃ dullabhānaṃ lokasmiṃ āyācanahetu vā patthanāhetu vā paṭilābho abhavissa, ko idha kena hāyetha?
89526.example_2: yāni kho pana tāni sekkhasammatāni kulānī'ti sekkhasammataṃ nāma kulaṃ yaṃ kulaṃ saddhāya vaḍḍhati, bhogena hāyati. evarūpassa kulassa ñattidutiyena kammena sekkhasammuti dinnā hoti.

26308.example_1: atha kho tesaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ etadahosi, atippago kho tāva sāvatthiyaṃ piṇḍāya carituṃ, yaṃ nūna mayaṃ yena aññatitthiyānaṃ paribbājakānaṃ ārāmo ten'upasaṅkameyyāmā'ti

64795.meaning_1: perceiving (a family) as designated stream enterers
64795.example_1: sekkhasammate sekkhasammatasaññī animantito agilāno khādanīyaṃ vā bhojanīyaṃva sahatthā paṭiggahetvā khādati vā bhuñjati vā, āpatti pāṭidesanīyassa.
64795.family_set: epithets of stream entry; types of ariyas

9858.meaning_1: perceiving (a family) as not designated stream enterers
9858.example_1: asekkhasammate vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. asekkhasammate asekkhasammatasaññī, anāpatti.

13712.example_1: sace sāsaṅkaṃ hoti, sāsaṅkanti ācikkhitabbaṃ, sace sappaṭibhayaṃ hoti, sappaṭibhayanti ācikkhitabbaṃ, sace, hotu, bhante, āhariyissatī'ti bhaṇati, corā vattabbā, manussā idh'ūpacaranti apasakkathā'ti.

48075.example_1: anāpatti paṭisaṃvidite, gilānassa, paṭisaṃvidite vā gilānassa vā sesakaṃ bhuñjati, bahārāme paṭiggahetvā antoārāme bhuñjati, tattha jātakaṃ mūlaṃ vā tacaṃ vā pattaṃ vā pupphaṃ vā phalaṃ vā bhuñjati, yāmakālikaṃ satt'āhakālikaṃ yāvajīvikaṃ sati paccaye paribhuñjati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

28189.example_1: anāpatti paṭisaṃvidite, gilānassa, paṭisaṃvidite vā gilānassa vā sesakaṃ bhuñjati, bahārāme paṭiggahetvā antoārāme bhuñjati, tattha jātakaṃ mūlaṃ vā tacaṃ vā pattaṃ vā pupphaṃ vā phalaṃ vā bhuñjati, yāmakālikaṃ satt'āhakālikaṃ yāvajīvikaṃ sati paccaye paribhuñjati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

18955.example_1: bodhisatto ito c'ito ca olokento kañci adisvā vegena uṭṭhāya pallaṅkaṃ ābhujitvā ān'āpāne pariggahetvā paṭhamajjhānaṃ nibbattesi.
18955.example_2: okkhittacakkhunā antaraghare gantabbaṃ yugamattaṃ pekkhantena. yo anādariyaṃ paṭicca tahaṃ tahaṃ olokento antaraghare gacchati, āpatti dukkaṭassa.

62730.meaning_1: a precept to be observed; a training rule to be practised
62730.example_1: na bhuñjamāno sabbaṃ hatthaṃ mukhe pakkhipissāmī'ti sikkhākaraṇīyā'ti.
62730.commentary: (SNa) sikkhā karaṇīyā'ti tividhā'pi sikkhā kātabbā. yog'ādīsu yogo'ti payogo. chando'ti kattu'kamyatākusalacchando. ussoḷhī'ti sabbasahaṃ adhimattavīriyaṃ.

73964.meaning_1: who has an unstable mind; who is mentally ungrounded
73964.example_1: anavaṭṭhitacittassa, saddhammaṃ avijānato, pariplavapasādassa, paññā na paripūrati.
73964.commentary: (DHPa) anavaṭṭhitacittassā'ti cittaṃ nām'etaṃ kassaci nibaddhaṃ vā thāvaraṃ vā n'atthi. yo pana puggalo assapiṭṭhe ṭhapitakumbhaṇḍaṃ viya ca thusarāsimhi koṭṭitakhāṇuko viya ca khallāṭasīse ṭhapitakadambapupphaṃ viya ca na katthaci saṇṭhāti, kadāci buddhasāvako hoti, kadāci ājīvako, kadāci nigaṇṭho, kadāci tāpaso. evarūpo puggalo anavaṭṭhitacitto nāma. tassa anavaṭṭhitacittassa. (JAa) anavaṭṭhitacittassā'ti appatiṭṭhitacittassa.

73966.meaning_1: whose mind is not oozing (with lust); who is not mentally sodden

73963.example_1: dūraṅ'gamaṃ ekacāraṃ, asarīraṃ guh'āsayaṃ, ye cittaṃ saṃyamessanti, mokkhanti mārabandhanā.
73963.commentary: (DHPa) uppattikāle ek'ekam'eva cittaṃ uppajjati, tasmiṃ niruddhe puna ek'ekam'eva uppajjatī'ti ekacaraṃ nāma jātaṃ.

73961.meaning_1: hard to protect; difficult to guard
73961.example_1: phandanaṃ capalaṃ cittaṃ, durakkhaṃ dunnivārayaṃ, ujuṃ karoti medhāvī, usukāro'va tejanaṃ.
73961.commentary: (DHPa) dūrakkhan'ti kiṭṭhasambādhe ṭhāne kiṭṭhakhādakagoṇaṃ viya ek'ekasmiṃ sappāy'ārammaṇe'y'eva duṭṭhapanato dūrakkhaṃ.

74170.example_1: idha socati pecca socati, pāpakārī ubhay'attha socati, so socati so vihaññati, disvā kammakiliṭṭham'attano.
74170.commentary: (DHPa) disvā kammakiliṭṭhan'ti attano kiliṭṭhakammaṃ passitvā nānappakārakaṃ vilapanto vihaññatī'ti.

73955.meaning_1: ranging in wrong notions; in the field of incorrect concepts
73955.example_1: asāre sāramatino, sāre c'āsāradassino, te sāraṃ n'ādhigacchanti, micchāsaṅkappagocarā.
73955.commentary: (DHPa) te sāran'ti te pana taṃ micchādiṭṭhiggahaṇaṃ gahetvā ṭhitā kāmavitakk'ādīnaṃ vasena micchāsaṅkappagocarā hutvā sīlasāraṃ, samādhisāraṃ, paññāsāraṃ, vimuttisāraṃ, vimuttiñāṇadassanasāraṃ, param'atthasāraṃ, nibbānañ'ca n'ādhigacchanti.

73956.meaning_1: ranging in right notions; in the field of correct concepts
73956.example_1: sārañ'ca sārato ñatvā, asārañ'ca asārato, te sāraṃ adhigacchanti, sammāsaṅkappagocarā.
73956.commentary: (DHPa) te sāran'ti te paṇḍitā evaṃ sammādassanaṃ gahetvā ṭhitā nekkhammasaṅkapp'ādīnaṃ vasena sammāsaṅkappagocarā hutvā taṃ vuttappakāraṃ sāraṃ adhigacchantī'ti.

73954.meaning_1: ease comes after; happiness results; pleasure follows
73954.example_1: manopubbaṅ'gamā dhammā, manoseṭṭhā manomayā, manasā ce pasannena, bhāsati vā karoti vā, tato naṃ sukham'anveti, chāyā'va anapāyinī.
73954.commentary: (PTP) tato naṃ sukham'anvetī'ti somanassam'api naṃ anveti yaṃ susukhacchāyā tadā'pi naṃ sukhaṃ tadapi anveti.

73957.example_1: yathā agāraṃ suchannaṃ, vuṭṭhī na samativijjhati, evaṃ subhāvitaṃ cittaṃ, rāgo na samativijjhati.

73959.example_1: appamatto pamattesu, suttesu bahujāgaro, abal'assaṃ'va sīgh'asso, hitvā yāti sumedhaso.
73959.commentary: (DHPa) abalassaṃvā'ti kuṇṭhapādaṃ chinnajavaṃ dubbalassaṃ sīghajavo sindhavājānīyo viya.

50956.grammar: ind, adv, abl sg of matta
50956.meaning_1: with measure (of); moderately; to a moderate degree
50956.example_1: yassa kho, bhikkhave, ime dhammā evaṃ paññāya mattaso nijjhānaṃ khamanti, ayaṃ vuccati dhamm'ānusārī, okkanto sammattaniyāmaṃ, sappurisabhūmiṃ okkanto, vītivatto puthujjanabhūmiṃ
50956.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlesu paripūrakārī hoti samādhismiṃ mattaso kārī paññāya mattaso kārī.

50331.grammar: masc, nom & voc sg & pl of bhavant, irreg
50331.meaning_1: (respectful address; especially between Brahmans) sir; sirs; master; masters; friend; friends; good man; good men
50331.example_1: tam'enaṃ mahā janakāyo saṅgamma samāgamma āyāceyya thomeyya pañjaliko anuparisakkeyya, ummujja, bho puthusile, uplava, bho puthusile, thalam'uplava, bho puthusile'ti.
50331.example_2: na c'āhaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ brūmi, yonijaṃ mattisambhavaṃ, bhovādi nāma so hoti, sace hoti sakiñcano, akiñcanaṃ anādānaṃ, tam'ahaṃ brūmi brāhmaṇaṃ.

29909.example_1: seyyathā'pi nāma maṇi veḷuriyo subho jātimā aṭṭh'aṃso suparikammakato paṇḍukambale nikkhitto bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca
29909.example_2: divā tapati ādicco, rattim'ābhāti candimā, sannaddho khattiyo tapati, jhāyī tapati brāhmaṇo, atha sabbam'ahorattiṃ, buddho tapati tejasā.
29909.synonym: ābhāti, kāsati, daddallati, dibbati, pakāseti, sobhati
29909.commentary: (SNa) tapatī'ti virocati. (DHPa) divā tapatī'ti divā virocati, rattiṃ pan'assa gatamaggopi na paññāyati.

70026.example_1: jānāti nāma vuḍḍho'ti jānāti, gilāno'ti jānāti, saṅghena dinno'ti jānāti.
70026.example_2: abhivādanasīlissa, niccaṃ vuḍḍha-āpacāyino, cattāro dhammā vaḍḍhanti, āyu vaṇṇo sukhaṃ balaṃ.

24383.example_1: phalaṃ ve kadaliṃ hanti, phalaṃ veḷuṃ phalaṃ naḷaṃ, sakkāro kāpurisaṃ hanti, gabbho assatariṃ yathā'ti.
24383.example_2: aññataraṃ itthiṃ gantvā nassarati. sā tena gabbhaṃ gaṇhi. tattha rañño evaṃ hoti, na kho idha añño koci pavisati aññatra pabbajitena.

25123.meaning_2: secret or private discussion or plan
25123.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rañño antepure abbhantarā guyhamantā bahiddhā gacchanti. tattha rañño evaṃ hoti, na kho idha añño koci pavisati aññatra pabbajitena.

38548.meaning_1: in a low position; occupying a low station
38548.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rājā nīcaṭṭhāniyaṃ ucce ṭhāne ṭhapeti. yesaṃ taṃ amanāpaṃ tesaṃ evaṃ hoti, rājā kho pabbajitena saṃsaṭṭho.

14276.meaning_1: in a high position; occupying a high station
14276.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rājā uccaṭṭhāniyaṃ nīce ṭhāne ṭhapeti. yesaṃ taṃ amanāpaṃ tesaṃ evaṃ hoti, rājā kho pabbajitena saṃsaṭṭho.

16983.meaning_1: having sent; having sent out; having dispatched
16983.meaning_2: having dismissed; having sent away; having sent off
16983.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rājā kāle senaṃ uyyojetvā antarāmaggato nivattāpeti. yesaṃ taṃ amanāpaṃ tesaṃ evaṃ hoti, rājā kho pabbajitena saṃsaṭṭho.

89209.example_1: so khv'āhaṃ, bhante, kālass'eva vuṭṭhāya purisaṃ uyyojemi, gaccha, bhaṇe, ciravāsiṃ kumāraṃ jānāhī'ti.
89209.example_2: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rājā akāle senaṃ uyyojeti. yesaṃ taṃ amanāpaṃ tesaṃ evaṃ hoti, rājā kho pabbajitena saṃsaṭṭho.

5728.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rājā kāle senaṃ uyyojetvā antarāmaggato nivattāpeti. yesaṃ taṃ amanāpaṃ tesaṃ evaṃ hoti, rājā kho pabbajitena saṃsaṭṭho.

38371.meaning_1: makes return; orders to turn back
38371.meaning_2: makes return, turn round, turn back; makes give up; makes stop, ceases; makes turn away from
38371.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rājā kāle senaṃ uyyojetvā antarāmaggato nivattāpeti. yesaṃ taṃ amanāpaṃ tesaṃ evaṃ hoti, rājā kho pabbajitena saṃsaṭṭho.

70932.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rañño rāj'antepuraṃ hatthisammaddaṃ assasammaddaṃ rathasammaddaṃ rajjanīyāni rūpasaddagandharasaphoṭṭhabbāni, yāni na pabbajitassa sāruppāni. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dasamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane.
70932.commentary: (VINa) rāj'antepuraṃ hatthisammaddan'ti-ādīsu hatthīhi sammaddo etthā'ti hatthisammaddaṃ, hatthisambādhan'ti attho. assarathasammaddapade'pi es'eva nayo. (VBt) hatthisammaddan'ti saṅghāṭasammaddo, akkamanaṃ cuṇṇatā'ti attho.

10012.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rañño rāj'antepuraṃ hatthisammaddaṃ assasammaddaṃ rathasammaddaṃ rajjanīyāni rūpasaddagandharasaphoṭṭhabbāni, yāni na pabbajitassa sāruppāni. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dasamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane.
10012.commentary: (VINa) rāj'antepuraṃ hatthisammaddan'ti-ādīsu hatthīhi sammaddo etthā'ti hatthisammaddaṃ, hatthisambādhan'ti attho. assarathasammaddapade'pi es'eva nayo.

54628.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rañño rāj'antepuraṃ hatthisammaddaṃ assasammaddaṃ rathasammaddaṃ rajjanīyāni rūpasaddagandharasaphoṭṭhabbāni, yāni na pabbajitassa sāruppāni. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dasamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane.
54628.commentary: (VINa) rāj'antepuraṃ hatthisammaddan'ti-ādīsu hatthīhi sammaddo etthā'ti hatthisammaddaṃ, hatthisambādhan'ti attho. assarathasammaddapade'pi es'eva nayo.

55245.meaning_1: sights, sounds, smells, tastes and touches
55245.construction:
rūpa + sadda + gandha + rasa + phoṭṭhabba + āni
rūpasaddagandharasaphoṭṭhabba + āni
55245.compound_construction: rūpāni ca saddā ca gandhā ca rasā ca phoṭṭhabbāni ca
55245.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, rañño rāj'antepuraṃ hatthisammaddaṃ assasammaddaṃ rathasammaddaṃ rajjanīyāni rūpasaddagandharasaphoṭṭhabbāni, yāni na pabbajitassa sāruppāni. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dasamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane.

66883.example_1: anekehi sambhārehi samāraddhā vadati, seyyath'idaṃ, doṇiñ'ca paṭicca cammañ'ca paṭicca daṇḍañ'ca paṭicca upadhāraṇe ca paṭicca tantiyo ca paṭicca koṇañ'ca paṭicca purisassa ca tajjaṃ vāyāmaṃ paṭicca ev'āyaṃ, bhante, vīṇā nāma anekasambhārā mahāsambhārā.
66883.example_2: sammādiṭṭhi sammāsaṅkappo sammāvācā sammākamm'anto sammāājīvo sammāvāyāmo sammāsati sammāsamādhi
66883.comment: the root is different mentioed now
